name: Burj Khalifa At The Top
description: Experience breathtaking panoramic views of Dubai from the world's tallest building. Visit levels 124 and 125 for an unforgettable sky-high experience.
cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before the experience. No refund for cancellations within 24 hours.
reschedule_policy: Reschedule free of charge up to 24 hours before the experience. Within 24 hours, a 25% fee applies.

name: Desert Safari with BBQ Dinner
description: Thrilling dune bashing, camel rides, sandboarding, and a lavish BBQ dinner under the stars at a traditional Bedouin camp.
cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before. 50% refund for cancellations 24–48 hours before. No refund within 24 hours.
reschedule_policy: Free reschedule up to 48 hours before the experience. A 15% fee applies within 48 hours.

name: Dubai Marina Luxury Cruise
description: Sail along the stunning Dubai Marina skyline on a luxury yacht. Enjoy fine dining, live entertainment, and spectacular views of the cityscape.
cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before. No refund within 24 hours.
reschedule_policy: Free reschedule up to 24 hours before. Within 24 hours, subject to availability and 20% fee.

name: Dubai Frame Experience
description: Walk the glass-floored sky bridge at the iconic Dubai Frame, connecting old Dubai to new Dubai with stunning 360° views.
cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 12 hours before. No refund within 12 hours.
reschedule_policy: Free reschedule up to 12 hours before the visit.

name: Ski Dubai Snow Park
description: Experience real snow in the middle of the desert! Ski, snowboard, or play in the world-class indoor ski resort at Mall of the Emirates.
cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before. 50% charge for cancellations 24–48 hours before. No refund within 24 hours.
reschedule_policy: Free reschedule up to 48 hours before. 10% fee applies for rescheduling within 48 hours.

variations.name: Ski Slope Pass with Equipment (3 Hours)

name: Dubai Creek Abra Ride & Gold Souk Tour
description: Ride a traditional wooden abra across Dubai Creek, explore the bustling Gold Souk and Spice Souk with a knowledgeable local guide.
cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before. No refund within 24 hours.
reschedule_policy: Free reschedule up to 24 hours before the tour.

variations.name: Evening Souk Tour with Dinner (5 Hours)

name: Dubai Helicopter Tour
description: See Dubai from the sky on an exhilarating helicopter tour over the Palm Jumeirah, Burj Al Arab, Dubai Marina, and the iconic skyline.
cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 72 hours before. 50% refund 48–72 hours before. No refund within 48 hours.
reschedule_policy: Free reschedule up to 72 hours before, subject to availability. A 20% fee applies within 72 hours.

name: Aquaventure Waterpark at Atlantis
description: Splash into the ultimate waterpark experience at Atlantis The Palm with thrilling slides, a lazy river, private beach access, and over 105 rides.
cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before. No refund within 24 hours.
reschedule_policy: Free reschedule up to 24 hours before. Non-refundable within 24 hours.

name: Dubai Museum of the Future
description: Step inside the most beautiful building on Earth and explore immersive exhibits about the future of humanity, technology, and sustainability.
cancellation_policy: Tickets are non-refundable but can be rescheduled.
reschedule_policy: Free reschedule up to 24 hours before. Within 24 hours, subject to availability.

name: Dubai Fountain Show & Boat Ride
description: Witness the world's largest choreographed fountain system at Dubai Mall. Enhance the experience with a traditional abra boat ride right on Burj Lake.
cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 12 hours before. No refund within 12 hours.
reschedule_policy: Free reschedule up to 12 hours before. Non-refundable within 12 hours.
